title: inga umbilicata
intro: Inga umbilicata, also known as the "umbilicate inga," is a tropical plant species native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Inga umbilicata can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent.
